defect: DP impulse lines sloped wrong for service (gas taps below pipe / liquid taps on top - the classic)
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Transmitter installation, part of the Instrumentation & Controls scope. The observed field condition is: DP impulse lines sloped wrong for service (gas taps below pipe / liquid taps on top - the classic). The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: API RP 551, mfr manuals.
title: Fault diagnosis: Transmitter installation (commercial project)
